calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #3, REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Aug-23-2011 Granted Per Written Order

FUTURE ACCOUNTING
Off Calendar Jul-11-2011 Off Calendar

FUTURE ACCOUNTING
Off Calendar Jun-13-2011 Continued To Jul-11-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: This matter was heard with case number PCN-05-288150 Conservatorhsip of Mia Lord.

Appearances: Lillian Ng for Christine Witherspoon (Petitioner/Trustee).

Ms. Ng requested a continuance stating that the Conservatee passed away and that she needed
30-days to file a Petition for Final Distribtion and for Termination of the Conservatorship. Status of the accounting was continued to July 11, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy K. Sandberg.

FUTURE ACCOUNTING
Off Calendar May-10-2011 Continued To Jun-13-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (174 Majestic Avenue, San Francisco, Ca 94112)
Off Calendar Sep-27-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Lillian Ng for Christine Witherspoon.

The sale was confirmed at $480,000.00. The sale will be subject to the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale. The Court granted the petition (subject to review of the order). No additional bond is required.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

Petition For Authority To Sell Settlor/Conservatee'S Real Prop. And To Execute Listing Agreement
Off Calendar Mar-02-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Lillian Ng for the Successor Trustee.

Ms. Ng stated that a reverse mortgage (RAM) was no longer an option, that they were out of funds, that the Conservatee had been moved to a Board and Care facility, that she seemed to be doing fine and that all Family members had been kept informed. In addition, Ms. Ng stated that they were upto $600,000.00 on the RAM and that there were no other alternatives. The Court granted the petition (signing the order for the same in open court).

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy V. Jung.

Petn. For Court Supervision Of Trust
Off Calendar Mar-30-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Christine Witherspoon (Conservator); Mia Lord (Conservatee); Norman McLeod (Court-appointed counsel for the Conservatee); Lillian Ng (Counsel for the Conservator).

In light of the discussion with regard to the conservatorship, the Court granted the Petition to appoint Christine Witherspoon as Successor Trustee (signing the Order in open Court). Bond was set and to remain at $175,000.

Judicial Officer: Commissioner Dorothy L. McMath; Reporter: Teanna Ward CSR# 11918; Court Investigator: Melinda Gean; Bailiff: A. Cruz; Clerk: R. Michael Diles.
